you_should_know.title: West Virginia Wesleyan College, American Red Cross among groups aiding Upshur County relief
you_should_know.summary: Relief effort follow-up to the major Upshur County flood disaster.
you_should_know.description:
WVWC serves as the hub for supply donations to the area.

The post West Virginia Wesleyan College, American Red Cross among groups aiding Upshur County relief appeared first on WV MetroNews.

you_should_know.title: About As Good As It Gets In Late July
you_should_know.summary: Tornado touchdowns and severe storm system across the region.
you_should_know.description: Tuesday was definitely a busy day in the Stormtracker7 Weather Center. Multiple tornado warnings were issued in the area and according to the National Weather Service in Pittsburgh two tornadoes touched down in the Muskingum County Tuesday afternoon. There were multiple touchdowns north of the area as well. Those storms were driven by a system [...]
